eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Potter; Randall, TX; at 09:29 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:29 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: This is a TEST of the Emergency Alert System. This is only a test. If this had been an actual emergency, official information and instructions would follow this alert. No action is required by the public at this time. For more information on local emergency preparedness, visit https://www.amarillo.gov/oem/
